title: ASR Outdoor 7pc Gemstone Mining Kit with Bucket Tweezer Brush Sifter 10x Loupe
description:
Learn how to pan for gold with this six piece ASR Outdoor gold pan kit for beginners. This exciting new prospecting starter gold panning kit includes engineered gold paydirt by professional prospector Bobby Bo. With this kit, you'll be able to learn and practice gold panning techniques at home without having to travel to a claim site. The ASR Outdoor six piece gold panning kit is an excellent option for kids and beginners who are just getting started in gold prospecting. Inside the kit, we’ve included six essential prospecting equipment tools to learn the basics of gold panning. You'll find a 10" dual riffle gold pan that will help you start identifying and collecting gold

Our Store

ASR Outdoor 7pc Gemstone Mining Kit with Bucket Tweezer Brush Sifter 10x Loupe

Whether you’re a seasoned prospector or just getting started with mining and geology hobbies, the ASR Outdoor Gemstone Mining Kit comes with essential items to enjoy the thrill of sifting through paydirt and identifying precious minerals! Inside the kit, you’ll find a 1x 5 pound bag of assorted rough gemstone paydirt, a gemstone identification chart, a plastic sieve, a 3.5-gallon bucket, a brush, a pair of tweezers, and a 10X magnifying loupe.

Key Features

  • 7PC GEMSTONE PAYDIRT KIT - This ASR Outdoor Gemstone Mining Kit comes with essential items to enjoy the thrill of sifting through paydirt and identifying precious minerals: 1x 5 pound bag of assorted rough gemstone paydirt, a gemstone identification chart, a plastic sieve, a 3.5 gallon bucket, a brush, a pair of tweezers and a 10X magnifying loupe
  • TOP QUALITY GEMSTONES - In your paydirt, you’ll discover an assortment of rough gemstones like Amazonite, Rough Amethyst, Carnelian, Citrine, Clear Quartz, Fuchsite, Labradorite, Pyrite, Moonstone, Rose Quartz, Sea Jasper, Smoky Quartz, Tiger Eye and more
  • PLASTIC SAND SIFTER - The kit comes with a 9.75” x 9.75” classifying sieve ideal for sifting through your gemstones and paydirt. The sieve has 36 holes per square inch, comes with convenient handles, and is made of durable plastic ideal for use in any weather
  • IDENTIFICATION CHART - Included is a gemstone identification chart so you can easily identify the gems from your rough mix bags, and the chart is laminated so you can take it with you to identify precious gems out in the field
  • COLLECTION TOOLS - We’ve also added a durable, high-quality plastic 3.5-gallon bucket, a pair of tweezers, a brush, and a 10X magnifying loupe for collecting, cleaning and analyzing your findings out in the field

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASRO7PCBUCGMKT
  • UPC: 810131701406
  • Color: Assorted
  • Size: 7pc

Our gemstone bags include top-quality gemstones in a rough assortment, including but not limited to: Amazonite, Rough Amethyst, Carnelian, Citrine, Clear Quartz, Fuchsite, Labradorite, Pyrite, Moonstone, Rose Quartz, Sea Jasper, Smoky Quartz, Tiger Eye and more! We’ve also included a gemstone identification chart so you can easily identify the gems from your rough mix bags, making this a great tool for beginners.

We’ve added a high-quality, durable plastic classifying sifter so you can easily sift through your gemstones and paydirt. The sieve has a stackable design and convenient handles to make sifting a breeze. We’ve also added a durable, high-quality plastic 3.5-gallon bucket, a pair of tweezers, a brush, and a 10X magnifying loupe for collecting, cleaning, and analyzing your findings out in the field. This is a great gift set idea for prospectors, gemstone enthusiasts, and kids studying geology!
